nasb.text: I will go to the great And will speak to them, For they know the way of the Lord And the ordinance of their God.” But they too, with one accord, have broken the yoke And burst the bonds.

esv.text: I will go to the great and will speak to them, for they know the way of the Lord, the justice of their God.” But they all alike had broken the yoke; they had burst the bonds.

cnv.text: 我要親自去見那些權貴領袖， 跟他們談談； 因為他們曉得耶和華的道路， 也明白他們　神的法則。” 誰知他們竟一起把軛折斷， 掙脫繩索。

ccb.text: 我要找他们的首领说话， 因为这些首领明白耶和华的道， 知道他们上帝的法令。” 然而，他们却一致违背耶和华的律法， 不服从祂的法令。
